name: arxiv-search
description: Search arXiv preprint repository for papers in physics, mathematics, computer science, quantitative biology, and related fields
capabilities: Search arXiv by keyword or topic
Access computer science, physics, and biology papers
No authentication required for arXiv API
author: langchain-ai
securitySummary: This skill is a legitimate research tool that queries the official arXiv API using the standard arxiv Python package. All 36 static findings are false positives: argparse was misidentified as cryptographic code, JSON text fields were flagged as encryption, and Markdown backticks were misclassified as shell execution. The code only makes read-only API requests to arxiv.org and has no file system access, no external commands, and no environment variable reading.
valueStatement: Finding academic papers across physics, mathematics, computer science, and quantitative biology can be time-consuming. This skill provides direct access to the arXiv preprint repository to search and retrieve paper titles and abstracts instantly.
limitations: Returns only paper titles and summaries (not full PDFs)
Limited to arXiv database only (no other academic sources)
No citation generation or reference checking

useCases.title: Literature review
useCases.description: Quickly find recent preprints on specific research topics before journal publication

useCases.title: ML paper discovery
useCases.description: Search for machine learning papers in cs.LG and stat.ML categories

useCases.title: Academic research
useCases.description: Access free scholarly articles for coursework and thesis research

promptTemplates.title: With limit
promptTemplates.prompt: Search arxiv for {topic} papers, return maximum of {n} results

promptTemplates.title: Category focus
promptTemplates.prompt: Search arxiv for papers about {topic} in computer science or machine learning

promptTemplates.title: Deep research
promptTemplates.prompt: Find the most relevant arxiv papers on {topic}, give me {n} results with full summaries

bestPractices: Use specific search terms for more relevant results
Combine multiple keywords for precise queries
Check paper submission dates for recent research
antiPatterns: Searching for very broad terms like science or computer
Expecting full-text content (only abstracts are returned)
Relying solely on arXiv without checking peer-reviewed journals

faq.question: Is arXiv free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, arXiv is free and open access. No API key or authentication is required.

faq.question: What topics can I search?
faq.answer: Physics, mathematics, computer science, quantitative biology, finance, statistics, and electrical engineering.

faq.question: How many results can I get?
faq.answer: Default is 10 papers. Use --max-papers flag to adjust the limit up or down.

faq.question: Does this download full papers?
faq.answer: No, this skill returns titles and abstracts only. Use arXiv links to access full PDFs.

faq.question: Why no results found?
faq.answer: Try different keywords. Some topics may not have preprints on arXiv. Check spelling of terms.

faq.question: How is this different from Google Scholar?
faq.answer: ArXiv focuses on preprints in STEM fields. Google Scholar covers all academic sources including peer-reviewed journals.
